description: User clicks the 'Save' button to confirm the short answer screener question
frame_description: The user is closing the 'Short answer' modal by clicking Save.

description: User clicks '+ Add another custom question' to open the question type selection menu
frame_description: A dropdown menu appears with question type options.

description: User selects 'Multiple choice' from the dropdown menu
frame_description: The user chooses the Multiple Choice question type.

description: User types 'Which' into the screener question input field in the Multiple Choice modal
frame_description: The user is beginning to draft a new multiple choice question.
